name: WORD Motion (W)

metadata.author: VIM Master Team
learningObjectives: Use W to move forward by WORDs
Understand that a WORD is whitespace-delimited, so punctuation stays attached

instructions: Lowercase w stops at punctuation; uppercase W jumps by WORDs, which break only on whitespace. So 'foo.bar' is a single WORD. Press W twice to land on 'end'.
